creator: mike.walker@napkindrawing.com
text:
Specifically, for four of the files, the patches came from this commit, all of this now is included in the ngx_http_lua so we don't need to add it manually as a ports patch.

https://github.com/openresty/lua-nginx-module/commit/0459a285ca0159d45e73da8bd1164edb5c57cde3



Regarding the OCSP patch, that line itself:

    ssl_conn->tlsext_status_expected = 1;

Was removed here:

https://github.com/openresty/lua-nginx-module/commit/cc0a793a27af48a364b951a374716b8cd5221487#diff-50267b7dd63c740bc5c1d29c7387e789

And you can see it doesn't exist any more in ngx_http_lua 0.10.11:

https://github.com/openresty/lua-nginx-module/blob/v0.10.11/src/ngx_http_lua_ssl_ocsp.c


Yay source control!

Cheers,
Mike
